resume_text:
Sample Candidate

Summary
Backend-focused software engineer with experience building Python services,
internal APIs, and data-backed product workflows.

Skills
Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pytest, Docker, React

Experience

Acme Analytics - Software Engineer
2024-01 - Present

- [exp_1_bullet_1] Built internal REST APIs using Python and FastAPI to support analyst workflows.
- [exp_1_bullet_2] Designed PostgreSQL tables and queries for customer reporting data.
- [exp_1_bullet_3] Added pytest coverage for service-layer validation and API error handling.

Campus Projects - Full-Stack Developer
2023-01 - 2023-12

- [exp_2_bullet_1] Built a React dashboard for reviewing uploaded documents and extracted metadata.
job_description_text:
Backend Engineer

We are looking for a backend engineer to build and maintain production APIs for
internal product teams.

Responsibilities

- Build backend APIs using Python.
- Design REST services with FastAPI or similar frameworks.
- Work with PostgreSQL-backed application data.
- Write automated tests for backend services.
- Deploy containerized services to Kubernetes.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience collaborating with product and data teams.
- Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD, and cloud deployment workflows.
